r 11

mdEN—SU lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ mdINANA—NUMUN—MU UNUGki itiKIN

Bel-eriba, the scribe, son of Ištar-zer-iddin. At Uruk, the month Ululu,

r 22

[U₄ ...] ⸢4⸣-KAM₂ MU 4-KAM₂ ša₂ da-ra-muš LUGAL KUR.KUR

4th [day], 4th year of Darius, king of all the lands.
